mappings.rationaleAI: Annie Besant's involvement in the Indian independence movement and the Home Rule League directly matches A.1.a on intensified agitation for Indian independence.
The Sino-Japanese War's coverage of the Burma Road supply line and Japanese occupation of Southeast Asia relates to B.4 on Indochina's involvement and Japanese occupation during WWII.
Lawrence of Arabia covers the Arab Revolt during WWI and British imperial strategy, but the episode focuses on the Middle East, not South and Southeast Asia. Reject.
